name: proxymanager-mcp-bridge
description: Stdio MCP bridge exposing ProxyManager's action registry to skill-aware clients.

scripts.build: esbuild proxymanager-mcp.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/proxymanager-mcp.bundle.mjs --banner:js="// GENERATED by \`npm run build\` from proxymanager-mcp.mjs — do not edit."
